title: Liberate your history
rationale: The watch holds only recent activities — your full history lives in your account export. Garmin's GDPR 'Full Data Export' and Strava's data download return your activities as ordinary FIT/GPX/TCX files (often gzip-compressed, inside nested zips), and both are exempt from the API paywalls. This imports those exports straight into your local archive and content-deduplicates them against what you already have, so a cloud export and a watch sync of the same activity collapse to one.

sources.title: Strava puts its API behind an $11.99/mo paywall — free data downloads & device integrations exempt
How to Export Your Garmin Data (Full Data Export: original FIT/GPX/TCX, derived metrics excluded)
